summary: Completed testing of Danish language feature for Habit Reset app. Language toggle, translations, and persistence working perfectly across login page and dashboard. Backend APIs remain 100% functional. Session timeout issue identified but not related to language feature.

integration_issues.issue: Session timeout causing logout during extended testing
integration_issues.note: Not related to Danish language feature - separate session management issue

passed_tests: Backend: All 15 API endpoints (100% success rate)
Language Toggle: Login page language toggle (data-testid='auth-lang-toggle') switches between English and Danish
Danish Login Page: Shows 'Log ind', 'Opret konto', 'E-mail', 'Adgangskode', 'Fortsæt med Google'
Dashboard Danish: Shows 'Godmorgen/God eftermiddag/Godaften' time-based greeting
Stats Section: Danish labels - 'Nuværende streak', 'Tranger modstået', 'Modstandsrate', 'Bedste streak'
Urge Button: Danish text 'Jeg har en trang' with description
Language Persistence: localStorage key 'habit_reset_lang' stores language preference correctly
Sidebar Language Toggle: (data-testid='lang-toggle') switches language across pages
Auth Flow: Login/logout still works with Danish language enabled
CRUD Operations: Backend integration remains functional with language switching
